parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "user_id": "{{ $('Build Email + Notification Content').first().json.user_id }}",
  "type": "welcome",
  "title": "Your AI operator is ready",
  "message": {{ JSON.stringify($('Build Email + Notification Content').first().json.notification_message) }},
  "action_label": "Open Workspace",
  "action_url": {{ JSON.stringify($('Build Email + Notification Content').first().json.dashboard_url) }},
  "read": false,
  "created_at": "{{ $('Build Email + Notification Content').first().json.now }}"
}

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "action": "welcome_sequence_sent",
  "user_id": "{{ $('Merge Send Results').first().json.user_id }}",
  "email": "{{ $('Merge Send Results').first().json.email }}",
  "email_sent": {{ $('Merge Send Results').first().json.email_sent }},
  "in_app_notification_created": {{ $('Merge Send Results').first().json.notif_created }},
  "operator_name": {{ JSON.stringify($('Merge Send Results').first().json.operator_name) }},
  "sent_at": "{{ $('Merge Send Results').first().json.now }}"
}
